hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today, you may find yourself energized and ready to tackle new challenges.
aries.love: A spark of passion may ignite in your relationship; cherish the moments.
aries.career: Opportunities for growth and advancement are on the horizon; stay alert.

taurus.general: Stability is key today; focus on maintaining equilibrium in your life.
taurus.love: Express your feelings openly to strengthen your bond with loved ones.
taurus.career: Patience and perseverance will pay off in your professional endeavors.

gemini.general: Communication flows easily today; use it to your advantage.
gemini.love: Engage in deep conversations to connect with your partner on a new level.
gemini.career: Networking opportunities may arise; don’t hesitate to put yourself out there.

cancer.general: Intuition will guide you; trust your instincts as you navigate the day.
cancer.love: Show your affection through small gestures; they will be deeply appreciated.
cancer.career: A creative solution may present itself; embrace it wholeheartedly.

leo.general: Confidence will shine through you; harness it to inspire others.
leo.love: A romantic surprise could make your day; enjoy the little things.
leo.career: Your leadership skills will be recognized; take charge of new projects.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will be crucial; ensure everything is in place.
virgo.love: Conversations about the future may arise; be honest about your desires.
virgo.career: Critical thinking will help you solve ongoing issues at work.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: It’s not about ideas. It’s about making ideas happen.
professional.author: Scott Belsky

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
motivation.author: Sam Levenson

captions.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
captions.author: T.S. Eliot

captions.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
captions.author: Helen Keller

captions.text: The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
captions.author: Oprah Winfrey

captions.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Do one thing every day that scares you.
captions.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

fun.text: Life is too important to be taken seriously.
fun.author: Oscar Wilde

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: The most wasted of days is one without laughter.
fun.author: E.E. Cummings

fun.text: Comedy is simply a funny way of being serious.
fun.author: Peter Ustinov

fun.text: Fun is not a straight line; it’s a tangled path that goes up and down.
fun.author: Cornelia Funke

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith is the assurance of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

faith.text: For with God nothing shall be impossible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: The greatest discovery of my generation is that a human being can alter his life by altering his attitude.
faith.author: William James

wisdom.text: The invariable mark of wisdom is to see the miraculous in the common.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: Saint Augustine
